title: TAPPaaS Role
description: A Role is a cross-cutting permission label associated with users (directly via User.roles or inherited via Group.roles). Standalone entity, NOT nested under org/group/user. Actual permissions are configured in Authentik via policies/entitlements. See ADR-007 P1 (ADR-007a).

name.description: Slug identifier (e.g. root, admin, user). Identity key — used to identify the role in Authentik.

description.description: Optional free-text description of the role's purpose.
